title: Diffusion Noise Scheduling & Denoising

use_cases.name: Encode Multiview Video to Latent
use_cases.description: Rearranges B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W, encodes via VAE/tokenizer, rescales by sigma_data

use_cases.name: Decode Latent to Multiview Video
use_cases.description: Inverse of encode: rearrange, decode via VAE/tokenizer, rescale by 1/sigma_data

use_cases.name: Compute Training Loss with Epsilon & Sigma
use_cases.description: Applies context parallel (CP) splitting to x0/epsilon across views, delegates to base class EDM loss
methods: → CP world_size > 1: kendall_loss *= cp_world_size if loss_reduce == 'sum'

use_cases.name: Augment Conditional Latent Frames with Noise
use_cases.description: Adds noise at augment_sigma to condition frames, composes input: indicator * augmented_latent + (1-indicator) * noise_x

use_cases.name: Set Condition Video Indicator (Noise Region Mask)
use_cases.description: Creates binary indicator tensor for which frames are condition vs generation regions
methods: Training: condition_location='first_random_n' → randint(0, max_n) frames set to 1
Inference: condition_location='first_n' → first num_condition_t frames set to 1

use_cases.name: Denoise Noisy Input (Epsilon Prediction)
use_cases.description: Core denoising: composites condition region with augmented latent, calls net for epsilon prediction, returns VideoDenoisePrediction
methods: → VIDEO path: augment_conditional_latent_frames() → compose new_noise_xt = indicator*augment + (1-indicator)*noise_x
→ returns VideoDenoisePrediction(x0, eps=batch_mul(noise_x - x0_pred, 1/sigma), logvar, net_in, net_x0_pred, xt, x0_pred_replaced)

use_cases.name: Classifier-Free Guidance Denoising Step
use_cases.description: Applies CFG: raw_x0 = cond_x0 + guidance * (cond_x0 - uncond_x0), optionally dual-guidance with trajectory

use_cases.name: Iterative Denoising Sampling Loop (Scheduler-Based)
use_cases.description: DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel uses scheduler.timesteps loop; others use sampler callable

use_cases.name: SDE Sampler-Based Generation (EDM-style)
use_cases.description: MultiviewDiffusionModel & MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel use SDE sampler with sigma_max initialization

use_cases.name: Context Parallel Distribution of Noisy Tensors
use_cases.description: When CP world_size > 1, x0/epsilon/xt are split across context parallel group along temporal dimension
methods: rearrange: B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W
rearrange: (B V) C T H W → B C (V T) H W

key_relationships: All three models compose vae/tokenizer for encode/decode
All three models compose net (DiT network) for epsilon prediction
MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel & DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel compose VideoExtendCondition with gt_latent + condition_video_indicator
DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel uses scheduler (DDPM-style) vs sde.sampler (EDM-style) for the other two

sigma_scheduling_notes.EDM_models: sigma_max from sde.sigma_max; sampler uses solver_option='2ab' (multistep); noise init: x = rand() * sigma_max
sigma_scheduling_notes.V2W_model: scheduler.init_noise_sigma for init; scheduler.sigmas[step_index] per step; scheduler.scale_model_input() & scheduler.precondition_inputs()
sigma_scheduling_notes.condition_augmentation: condition frames augmented with small sigma (default=0.001 in training, configurable in inference); if augment_sigma >= generation sigma, indicator zeroed out

important_notes: All models rearrange multiview tensors B C (V T) H W ↔ (B V) C T H W for per-view VAE/tokenizer ops and CP splitting. MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel supports both 'first_n' (inference) and 'first_random_n' (training) condition region selection. DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel is inference-only (asserts num_condition_t != None, no random training mode).
